productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Advent Blue Sports Shoes
description: Sharing the simple look and feel of the archival table tennis and plimsole shoe, the Advent shoe from adidas blends the retro and modern to create comfortable and stylish footwear perfect for sport.UpperSynthetic leather upper for supple comfortLace-up for a snug, customised FitPadded collar for optimum fitTextile inner lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for styleOutsoleVulcanised rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if necessaryDo not store in direct sunlight
